reference: I was hit by a car in two thousand and twelve and sustained a tibial plateau fracture in my left knee. Atrophy set in my quadriceps, and I have slowly increased from a knot-like pain in my back to my upper left thigh. It is mostly on the left side, but sometimes on the right. Is it a nerve causing this? I use muscle pain relief rub every day.
text: I was put by a car in 2012 and sustained a tibial plateau fracture in my left knee. I could be fed in my quadriceps, and I have slowly increased from a knot like pain in my back to my upper left side. It is mostly on the left side, but sometimes on the right. Is it a nerve causing this? I use muscle pain relief rub every day.
